data.title: Marvion Inc. sees revenue surge over 100%, starts building new warehouses in Hong Kong. Financial stats revealed.
data.description: In Hong Kong on October 24, 2025, Marvion Inc. (OTCQB: MVNC), a company with holdings in logistics, warehousing, and consulting services, released unaudited financial data for the first half of 2025. Key figures revealed during this period included...

data.title: Concours D'Elegance Texas launching luxury lifestyle community on Lake Travis, aiming to set new standards in elite living.
data.description: Announcement: Concours D'Elegance Texas has officially launched its private mixed-use lifestyle community on Lake Travis in Austin, Texas. This unique project allows ownership to be utilized as a live-work development, setting a new standard for elite collectors, enthusiasts, and entrepreneurs. The exclusive enclave aims to be the premier luxury lifestyle destination in Texas, offering unparalleled opportunities for residents. The project promises to surpass current expectations and redefine upscale living in the state.

data.title: General Dynamics beats Q3 2025 expectations with $12.907B revenue, $3.88 EPS, and $1.3B operating earnings.
data.description: General Dynamics (NYSE: GD) exceeded Wall Street expectations in the third quarter of 2025, leading to a surge in stock prices. The aerospace and defense company reported total revenue of $12.907 billion, showing a 10.6% increase from the previous year and surpassing the projected $12.566 billion. Diluted GAAP earnings per share (EPS) stood at $3.88, surpassing the estimated $3.69 and reflecting a 15.8% increase year-over-year. Operating earnings reached $1.3 billion, resulting in an operating margin of 10.3%, up by 20 basis points from the previous year. This strong performance was driven by robust operational results in all segments. Furthermore, the company experienced strong order activity that contributed to a growing backlog.
U.S. September CPI Due 8:30 a.m. ET; Seen +0.4%; Core +0.3%

data.title: Uber and WeRide start offering autonomous Robotaxi rides in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia - a new milestone in AV technology.
data.description: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, WeRide (NASDAQ: WRD) and Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) have launched autonomous Robotaxi passenger services. This marks the debut of autonomous vehicles on the Uber platform in Saudi Arabia, a significant step in Uber's collaboration with the Transport General Authority (TGA) to support the Kingdom's Vision 2030. Vision 2030 aims to position Saudi Arabia as a leader in technology and innovation. The partnership signifies a key milestone in providing cutting-edge transportation options to the public in Riyadh.

data.title: Major Bitcoin whales can influence market shifts, but ETF flows, exchange liquidity, and macro trends play key roles in daily price movements.
data.description: Whales continue to impact prices, however, Bitcoin's daily fluctuations are increasingly influenced by factors such as ETF flows, exchange liquidity, and macroeconomic shifts. While whales still play a significant role in market movements, their influence is being overshadowed by these other factors. This shift in influence reflects a changing landscape for Bitcoin, where a variety of elements now contribute to its daily price changes.

data.title: Thai regulators conduct raid on World's iris scanning site for unlicensed WLD token activities, causing legal worries for Sam Altman.
data.description: The Securities and Exchange Commission in Thailand conducted a raid on the World's iris scanning site due to their unlicensed WLD token operations. This move has sparked legal concerns for Sam Altman's digital identity project. The raid comes as a surprise and has led to a closer investigation into the operations of the company. This development has also heightened scrutiny on the project, with concerns about compliance and regulatory issues. The SEC's action highlights the importance of adhering to regulations in the cryptocurrency space. This event has raised questions about the future of the digital identity project, especially in light of the growing regulatory enforcement in the sector. Thailand's SEC's intervention underscores the need for companies to ensure they are operating within the legal framework to avoid such consequences.

data.title: Corporate crypto treasuries drain $800B from altcoins as retail investors lose out, possibly for good.
data.description: According to research conducted by 10x Research, retail investors have funneled approximately $800 billion into corporate crypto treasuries. This surge in investment has primarily come at the cost of altcoins, reflecting a significant shift in market preferences.

data.title: Dogecoin's price needs to surpass $0.20 resistance for a 25% increase, possibly reaching $0.25.
data.description: For Dogecoin to show a decrease in selling pressure, it needs to surpass the $0.20 resistance level. This could lead to an increase in the DOGE price, possibly reaching above $0.25.

data.title: Five individuals admit guilt in $7.9M Dark Web drug scheme. FireBunnyUSA shipped 10,000+ drug packs, masking millions in crypto profits.
data.description: For a span of three years, an organization known as FireBunnyUSA conducted operations, managing to ship more than 10,000 packages containing illegal drugs. During this time, they utilized cryptocurrency as a means to conceal millions in profits generated from these activities.

data.title: Former UN Secretary-General Ban Ki-moon praises AiMOGA Robotics in Wuhu, China; visits as Chery Global ESG Honorary Advisor, on Oct. 24, 2025.
data.description: In Wuhu, China on October 24, 2025, the riverside city hosted a special visitor, former UN Secretary-General Ban Ki-moon, who now serves as Chery Global ESG Honorary Advisor. The city was filled with the scent of osmanthus as autumn progressed during his visit.

data.title: Pepsi National Battle of the Bands expands to Palm Beach County for 2026 MLK Weekend Celebration from Jan 15–18.
data.description: A weekend celebration in honor of MLK is scheduled to take place from January 15 to 18 throughout Palm Beach County. The Pepsi National Battle of the Bands (NBOTB) will be making its debut in South Florida, marking an expansion of its unique event that highlights the excellence of Historically Black Colleges and Universities (HBCUs) through music and performances. The celebration promises an iconic experience, attracting a significant audience to witness the showcase of talent. The event is set to bring together a diverse group of participants and attendees, offering a platform to recognize and celebrate the cultural significance of HBCUs.

data.title: Global ice storage bins market set to grow at 4.27% CAGR from 2024 to 2030, with increased adoption of modular and portable solutions.
data.description: A report on the Ice Storage Bins Market for the period 2025-2030 has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global market for ice storage bins is projected to experience a growth rate of 4.27% from 2024 to 2030. The industry has seen a trend towards utilizing modular and portable options in recent times as organizations aim to enhance efficiency. This shift has led to an increased demand for versatile ice storage solutions across various sectors.

data.title: Keurig Dr Pepper to report Q3 earnings, analysts expect 54 cents/share, revenue of $4.15 billion. Stock offers 3.34% yield.
data.description: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. is set to reveal its third-quarter earnings on October 27, prior to market open. Analysts predict earnings per share of 54 cents, an increase from 51 cents reported last year. Revenue for the quarter is estimated to reach $4.15 billion, up from $3.89 billion in the previous year. JPMorgan analyst Andrea Teixeira reaffirmed an Overweight rating on the company on October 20, adjusting the price target from $39 to $36. Keurig Dr Pepper currently offers an annual dividend yield of 3.34%, attracting attention from investors seeking potential gains. For further information, the full report is accessible on Benzinga’s website.

data.title: BiomEdit receives $2M from Bezos Earth Fund to develop AI model for methane reduction in cattle with partners MENDOTA, IL, Oct. 24, 2025, (PRNewswire).
data.description: A collaboration between Bioversity International USA and Yale University in GREENFIELD, Ind., announced on Oct. 24, 2025, aims to develop the Rumen Digital Twin. This innovative project will focus on creating a model to optimize climate-smart feed and microbiome interventions. The partnership will bring together experts to work on this cutting-edge technology that has the potential to revolutionize livestock farming practices. This initiative will not only enhance agricultural sustainability but also contribute to reducing greenhouse gas emissions. Stay tuned for updates on this groundbreaking endeavor.
